headline: Why Is CrowdStrike (CRWD) Up 7.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: CrowdStrike (CRWD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Cisco Stock Is Soaring On A Massive AI Bet
summary: Management put a stunningly large number on its AI future, and investors are piling in. But the real story is what this growth costs.

headline: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Invested in Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Defying Market Concerns
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Large-Cap Growth Strategy” for the first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy experienced a decline in the first quarter of 2026, modestly trailing the Russell 1000 Growth Index. headline: AI Governance & Risk Platforms Lead Growth in Agentic AI Security Sector with Highest Predicted CAGR
summary: The agentic AI security market is set to expand from USD 1.65 billion in 2026 to USD 13.52 billion by 2032, driven by a 42.0% CAGR. As third-party AI tools grow, demand for secure integration across agentic environments rises. The BFSI sector will lead market adoption with autonomous systems enhancing fraud detection and risk assessment, necessitating robust security measures.
